title: In Ipanema, Rio de Janeiro, seven people observed two round multicolor UFOs over the sea [1991]
excerpt: MAY 19th, 1991. Time: 8:30 pm. Duration: 110 minutes. text_preview: MAY 19th, 1991. Time: 8:30 pm. Duration: 110 minutes. From the roof of a building in the region of Ipanema, city of Rio de Janeiro-RJ, seven people observed for almost two hours two unidentified flying objects next to each other over the high seas, “right in front of Posto 9 – Ipanema”. According to the witnesses, the UFOs were “two luminous balls of green, red and yellow color” that did not move, performing “only rotation movements”. The objects were positioned “relatively lower than the stars” and were moving away “progressively during the period observed towards the high seas directly ahead
summary: Seven witnesses on an Ipanema rooftop observed two luminous multicolor rotating balls hovering over the sea for nearly two hours, observed also by passing aircraft, on May 19, 1991.
